\section*{Appendix S2 — Sensitivity analyses}
\label{appendix:s2}

\subsection*{S2.1 Prerequisite-mining thresholds}

We sweep the three knobs of the prerequisite-mining heuristic (forward conditional $P(B|A)$, reverse conditional $P(A|B)$, minimum co-occurring students $\min\text{co-occur}$) on seed~42 and report the number of edges mined, the GraphSAGE link-prediction AUC on a held-out 20\% of edges, and the downstream NDCG@10 produced by rebuilding MARS with those thresholds and the pretrained seed~42 Prediction checkpoint.

\textit{Not yet populated; run \texttt{scripts/sensitivity\_kg\_thresholds.py}.}
\subsection*{S2.2 Recommendation scoring weights}

We sweep the gap-probability weight and the MMR diversity parameter $\lambda$ on seed~42. Other scoring weights (strategy score, ZPD bonus, recency) are held at their default values.

\textit{Not yet populated; run \texttt{scripts/sensitivity\_recommendation\_weights.py}.}
\subsection*{S2.3 Context-window size at inference}

We evaluate the trained seed-42 checkpoint with input context truncated to $\{25, 50, 75, 100\}$ most recent interactions. The model was trained with $\texttt{seq\_len}=100$, so the smaller-context variants reflect how MARS behaves for users with shorter recent history. No retraining is required.

\textit{Not yet populated; run \texttt{scripts/sensitivity\_context\_window.py}.}
